case_imprimil.title: Integrated
case_imprimil.subtitle: A complex production management application designed to handle specific business rules (such as minimum fees and material waste), with multi-level access protected by Firebase.
case_imprimil.challenge_desc: The quoting process for fleets and graphic materials involved time-consuming manual calculations. Additionally, very small quotes generated losses due to fixed machine setup and technical displacement costs. The solution needed to be fast, cloud-based, and error-proof.
case_imprimil.arch_desc: I developed a React SPA protected by Firebase AuthProvider. Only managers can approve layouts or change base material costs in Firestore. The application processes complex quotes and communicates via REST API with billing systems.
case_imprimil.rule_applied: Rule applied: The subtotal was below the operational floor. The system blocked the loss and adjusted it to the minimum fee of $ 350.00.

case_asana.title: 'Smart Accordion'
case_asana.subtitle: An invisible data engineering pipeline that connects planning in Google Sheets to operational execution in Asana, automating physical production workflows in real-time.
case_asana.challenge_desc: The planning sector generated massive Service Orders (SO) in Google Sheets. However, for the factory to run, each SO had to be manually broken down in Asana into daily tasks (Printing, Assembly, Application), allocating specific teams. This caused delays, duplicates, and loss of original HTML formatting.
case_asana.arch_desc: I created a Python script scheduled via GitHub Actions. It scans the spreadsheets, consumes the Asana REST API, and creates the "Accordion" effect: one spreadsheet row turns into multiple chained micro-tasks in the cloud, with dynamically mapped labels (like 'on_track' or 'on_hold') and preventing database duplicates.
case_asana.board_empty: Empty board. Run the automation to import spreadsheet data.

case_dre.title: Consolidated
case_dre.subtitle: Data engineering applied to financial intelligence. A complete pipeline extracting legacy databases to the cloud, feeding dynamic executive panels.
case_dre.challenge_desc: The project's main challenge was extracting data from the company's old ERP system (Gestind), which stored all financial information in a local Microsoft Access database (.mdb). Directors needed to consolidate results from multiple branches, but the process required endless manual exports.
case_dre.arch_desc: I developed a Python pipeline using the pyodbc library to access legacy .mdb files over the local network. The script processes and cleans data with pandas, automatically injecting them into cloud spreadsheets/databases, which finally feed the P&L (Profit and Loss) views in Looker Studio.

case_cleaner.title: Personal Cleaner
case_cleaner.subtitle: A high-end cleaning services platform that combines a B2C conversion experience (Wizard) with a lightweight B2B lead management CRM, operating with virtually zero infrastructure cost.
case_cleaner.challenge_desc: High-standard cleaning services demand a clean and minimalist visual identity. The challenge was to replace the friction of long forms or cold direct contacts on WhatsApp with an elegant quoting funnel, where the client feels they are building a personalized service.
case_cleaner.arch_desc: The system was designed to maximize profits by eliminating fixed server costs. Using Firebase's free quotas, the Landing Page also acts as a lean CRM. Leads are captured, qualified by the admin, and when marked as "Converted", automatically sync with a financial spreadsheet in Google Sheets.
case_cleaner.quote_desc: Check the lead in the panel next to it.
